mnemonics.title: CHAFGMS - ANN Application Domains
mnemonics.content: Computer vision, Healthcare, Autonomous vehicles, Finance, Gaming, Manufacturing, Speech/NLP - the major ANN application areas.

mnemonics.title: CNN Sees, RNN Hears, GAN Creates
mnemonics.content: CNN for vision applications, RNN for speech/language, GAN for content generation - match the architecture to the application.

mnemonics.title: Finance Triple
mnemonics.content: Fraud detection (anomaly), Trading (prediction), Credit scoring (classification) - three key ANN applications in finance.

mnemonics.title: Healthcare DDP
mnemonics.content: Diagnosis (image analysis), Drug discovery (molecular prediction), Prognosis (patient outcome prediction) - ANN healthcare trio.

mnemonics.title: Auto = See + Decide + Drive
mnemonics.content: Object detection (see), Path planning (decide), Vehicle control (drive) - three ANN roles in autonomous vehicles.
